message:
test(server): cover parse_params, RequestCompletion, and utility functions [bd-377r]

Add 21 new tests in a new helper_function_tests module covering previously
untested lib.rs utility code:
- parse_params: None error, valid parse, invalid type error
- parse_params_or_default: None→default, valid parse, invalid type error
- stable_hash_request_id: deterministic, different strings differ, never-zero
- transport_lock_error: returns Io error with poison message
- RequestCompletion: new/is_done, mark_done, idempotent mark, wait_timeout
  (already done, timeout, cross-thread completion)
- LoggingConfig::default values
- DuplicateBehavior: Default is Warn, Debug/Clone, Eq variants
- Server::log_level_rank ordering (Debug < Info < Warning < Error)

Server tests: 1202 → 1223

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
